nasb.text: Throughout his life he also eats in darkness with great vexation, sickness and anger.

esv.text: Moreover, all his days he eats in darkness in much vexation and sickness and anger.

cnv.text: 他終生在黑暗中吃喝，多有愁煩、疾病與憤怨。

ccb.text: 他一生活在黑暗中，饱受烦恼、病痛和愤怒的困扰。

csbs.text: 并且他一生的日子里都在黑暗中吃喝，多有烦恼、疾病和怒气。
